properties.name: endpoint
properties.label: Matrix endpoint URL
properties.description: Scripted REST URL the matrix fetches its rows from. Defaults to the PDI scope; production ports typically bind this per environment.

properties.name: baseUrl
properties.label: Detail API base URL
properties.description: URL prefix the detail tabs (customer-order / RFS / task) build their own fetch URLs from. Should be the Scripted REST API base in the same scope as the matrix endpoint.

uiBuilder.label: HFS Work Order Matrix
uiBuilder.description: HFS Work Order × Task status matrix with drill-down tabs
